title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Nimbus Post

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Nimbus Post
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!
